message:
feat(showcase): add presenter mode with step-sequenced guided tour and expand demo strategy

- Add presenter mode section to demo showcase with start/prev/next/skip/
  reset controls, step summary/note display, and a main-demo tour
  covering runtime honesty, spotlight, resilience, determinism, evidence,
  export, and compare-mode steps
- Add presenter grid CSS layout and controls styling
- Add demo_strategy note: launch-readiness lane should expose presenter
  mode directly in the page rather than requiring a parallel slide deck
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -171,13 +171,13 @@
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","title":"Build theme/style studio with preset and parameterized controls","description":"## Objective
Show visual customization depth and quality.

## Subtasks
- Expose preset themes and key style knobs.
- Provide before/after comparisons with reset semantics.
- Persist style state in shareable links.

## Evidence
Theme changes are reproducible and visibly coherent across scenario families.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Added a runtime-backed theme/style studio to the showcase with preset, font size, padding, corner radius, shadow, and embedded CSS controls; persisted studio state in URL links; threaded the shared studio state through spotlight, gallery, and playground FrankenMermaid render paths; and updated the playground contract in evidence/demo_strategy.md.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.952618155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T20:21:12.918417705Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T20:21:12.918147463Z","close_reason":"Completed runtime-backed theme/style studio with URL persistence and reset semantics.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","showcase","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.344319869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.952618155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","title":"Build export/artifact lab (SVG, PNG, IR, config/state)","description":"## Objective
Demonstrate production-ready outputs and interoperability.

## Subtasks
- Export SVG, PNG, parser IR, and effective config/state.
- Add artifact metadata for reproducibility (timestamps, hash/size where applicable).
- Validate exported outputs for basic integrity constraints.

## Evidence
Artifacts are downloadable, valid, and traceable to demo state.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Added an export/artifact lab to the showcase with SVG, PNG, parser IR, and config/state exports; attached in-page artifact metadata including bytes, SHA-256, timestamp, and integrity notes; and updated evidence/demo_strategy.md to codify browser-surface-only export semantics.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.049858506Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-28T05:10:34.010376321Z","closed_at":"2026-03-28T05:10:34.010114706Z","close_reason":"Completed browser-surface export/artifact lab with traceable metadata and integrity checks.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","export","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.436018677Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.049858506Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","title":"Build full-capability gallery and compare mode with guided callouts","description":"## Objective
Guarantee complete capability discoverability in the UI.

## Subtasks
- Create scenario gallery covering all major diagram families and capability tags.
- Add compare mode to juxtapose scenarios/settings/renderers.
- Add guided callouts that explain capability significance.

## Evidence
Gallery coverage report confirms no major feature family is missing from showcase navigation.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Extended the gallery with a shareable compare mode for up to two scenarios, added guided callouts anchored in scenario narrative/proof data, preserved spotlight/editor handoff from compare cards, and updated evidence/demo_strategy.md to codify compare-mode behavior without breaking spotlight-first sequencing.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.149478851Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-28T05:36:44.177639273Z","closed_at":"2026-03-28T05:36:44.177351498Z","close_reason":"Completed gallery compare mode with guided callouts and shareable compare state.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","gallery","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.811648505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.149478851Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.529005095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.623553246Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.717849847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-2u0.5.6","title":"Implement trust, observability, accessibility, and polish systems","description":"## Why this exists
Trust and polish determine whether the demo is credible. This track ensures the app proves determinism, performance, accessibility, and cross-platform quality.

## Scope
- Stage telemetry and performance panel.
- Determinism verification tools.
- Accessibility and reduced-motion compliance.
- Cross-browser/mobile hardening and optimization.

## Deliverables
- In-app trust instrumentation.
- Reproducibility checker.
- Accessibility and compatibility hardening artifacts.

## Acceptance Evidence
Demo provides objective evidence for speed, stability, and inclusivity claims.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.248999580Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:18.365020676Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","quality","reliability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.248999580Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.727303617Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.824940489Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":116,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2u0.5.6","title":"Implement trust, observability, accessibility, and polish systems","description":"## Why this exists
Trust and polish determine whether the demo is credible. This track ensures the app proves determinism, performance, accessibility, and cross-platform quality.

## Scope

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.6.1","title":"Implement stage telemetry panel (timings, counts, warnings, degradation)","description":"## Objective
Expose what happens inside each render cycle.

## Subtasks
- Instrument parse/layout/render timing and counts.
- Show warnings/errors and fallback/degradation indicators.
- Provide human-readable and machine-readable telemetry views.

## Evidence
Telemetry panel reflects stage metrics accurately during interactive editing.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.346997468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-29T22:29:37.134759660Z","closed_at":"2026-03-29T22:29:37.134442049Z","close_reason":"Completed: added stage telemetry panel with human-readable cards and machine-readable JSON snapshot in the standalone showcase, plus contract update.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","performance","telemetry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.905756533Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.346997468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.6.2","title":"Implement in-app determinism checker with hash/diff evidence","description":"## Objective
Prove deterministic behavior to skeptical technical users.

## Subtasks
- Re-run same input/config multiple times.
- Hash and compare normalized outputs.
- Present diffs when non-determinism is detected.

## Evidence
Determinism checker reports stable hashes for known-deterministic scenarios.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.448962331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-29T22:36:29.549433600Z","closed_at":"2026-03-29T22:36:29.549172315Z","close_reason":"Completed: added in-app determinism checker with normalized hash/diff evidence, static /web replay scenario, tests, and evidence bundle.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","determinism","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.091902332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.448962331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.998844441Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.6.3","title":"Implement accessibility hardening (keyboard, semantics, reduced-motion)","description":"## Objective
Make accessibility a visible, demonstrable strength.

## Subtasks
- Ensure keyboard navigation and focus management across core flows.
- Validate semantic labeling for controls and output regions.
- Enforce reduced-motion behavior and high-contrast legibility.

## Evidence
Accessibility checklist passes with documented exceptions and remediations.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.546512452Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-29T23:54:34.020483695Z","closed_at":"2026-03-29T23:54:34.020166064Z","close_reason":"Completed: accessibility hardening for keyboard flows, semantic/live-region labeling, reduced-motion behavior, harness validation, and static replay evidence.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["accessibility","demo","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.279193115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.185918227Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.546512452Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.6.4","title":"Harden cross-browser/mobile behavior and optimize runtime/bundle","description":"## Objective
Ensure demo works reliably across environments without feeling heavy.

## Subtasks
- Cross-browser validation for major desktop and mobile targets.
- Optimize critical-path loading and runtime hotspots.
- Add fallbacks for capability gaps without silent breakage.

## Evidence
Compatibility matrix and performance budget report meet launch thresholds.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.719238563Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-30T00:05:53.470671409Z","closed_at":"2026-03-30T00:05:53.470334882Z","close_reason":"Completed: cross-browser/mobile hardening with UUID, clipboard, IntersectionObserver, backdrop-filter, and reduced-motion fallbacks plus compatibility evidence.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compatibility","demo","performance"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.373553054Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.471722734Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.719238563Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.7","title":"Operationalize launch readiness, presenter workflows, and deployment","description":"## Why this exists
A polished demo still fails if launch and operations are ad hoc. This track packages presenter mode, release gates, and deployment automation.

## Scope
- Guided tour/presenter UX.
- Formal QA and release signoff matrix.
- Automated deployment with safe rollback posture.

## Deliverables
- Operator-friendly demo mode.
- Repeatable launch checklist.
- CI/CD path for predictable publishing.

## Acceptance Evidence
A new operator can deploy and present the demo from the runbook without tribal knowledge.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.827802869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:17.605267402Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","operations","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.827802869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.917883877Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.013322274Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":117,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-2u0.5.7.1","title":"Build guided tour and presenter control mode for live storytelling","description":"## Objective
Enable polished live presentations with minimal operator friction.

## Subtasks
- Implement guided tour mode with step sequencing and narration hints.
- Provide presenter controls (next/prev/skip/reset) and safe state reset.
- Support fallback paths when a scenario fails during presentation.

## Evidence
Presenter can run end-to-end scripted demo without manual environment surgery.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.934507955Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:17.453006879Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","presenter","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.571024313Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.669753921Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.934507955Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","title":"Create release gate checklist and end-to-end validation matrix","description":"## Objective
Prevent launch by optimism; require evidence.

## Subtasks
- Define e2e validation matrix tied to KPI rubric.
- Add release gate checklist with owners and signoff criteria.
- Record known risks and mitigation playbooks.

## Evidence
Release signoff artifact is complete, auditable, and reproducible.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.040724206Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:27.453164066Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","qa","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.11.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:27.453102019Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.866712830Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.961277702Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.040724206Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:29.773633718Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.7.3","title":"Automate deployment pipeline with smoke checks and rollback procedures","description":"## Objective
Ship reliably and recover quickly.

## Subtasks
- Automate build/deploy flow for the demo surface.
- Add smoke checks post-deploy.
- Define rollback/roll-forward procedures and ownership.

## Evidence
Pipeline can deploy, verify, and recover from failed releases using documented commands.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.139600619Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:17.144299495Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","demo","deploy"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.139600619Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30.053897454Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:42.012686108Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.8","title":"Deliver dual showcase surfaces: static HTML (/web) and React (/web_react)","description":"## Why this exists
The user explicitly wants two demo delivery surfaces: static HTML (`/web`) and React component (`/web_react`). This track ensures both are first-class deliverables with shared behavior contracts.

## Scope
- Define shared showcase core contracts.
- Implement static HTML showcase path.
- Implement React showcase path.
- Prove parity across both surfaces.

## Deliverables
- Static showcase artifact behavior centered on `frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html` semantics.
- React component showcase variant.
- Cross-surface parity checks for controls, scenarios, diagnostics, and exports.

## Acceptance Evidence
A capability parity report confirms both surfaces expose equivalent feature coverage and expected behavior for core scenarios.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:38.371565192Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:16.975867346Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","html","react","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:38.371565192Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:40.027411105Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:40.126693878Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:40.224928579Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":118,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Detailed intent: dual-surface requirement is explicit and non-negotiable. This track prevents static/React divergence and ensures both /web and /web_react are treated as product surfaces, not afterthoughts.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:35:42Z"}]}

@@ -270,6 +270,7 @@ Playground section:
 - The playground should include an in-app determinism checker that reruns the current FrankenMermaid render path under the active source/style config, hashes normalized evidence snapshots, and shows the first diff excerpt whenever repeated runs diverge.
 - The standalone and hosted showcase surfaces should be visibly keyboard-usable: skip navigation, focus handoff into spotlight/editor flows, semantic labels on evidence regions, and reduced-motion behavior should all survive static hosting instead of depending on manual presenter habits.
 - The standalone and hosted showcase surfaces should also tolerate common browser capability gaps without silent breakage: UUID generation, clipboard copy, lazy gallery rendering, and glass/backdrop styling all need explicit fallback paths so mobile and older engines degrade honestly rather than failing opaquely.
+- The launch-readiness lane should expose a presenter mode directly in the page: step-sequenced storytelling, next/prev/skip/reset controls, and URL-restorable presenter state should drive the existing spotlight/playground/support surfaces rather than introducing a parallel slide deck.
 - The playground should include a layout/cycle lab driven by real runtime metadata: algorithm dispatch, cycle strategy, crossings, and guard/budget facts should be inspectable per revision, while any analysis controls remain explicitly read-only unless the browser runtime later exposes writable layout knobs.
 - The playground should include a theme/style studio that is constrained to runtime-backed knobs only, persists its state in shareable links, and can always reset to a known baseline so before/after comparisons stay reviewable.
 - The playground should include an export/artifact lab that only offers browser-surface outputs the current page can really produce, and every export should carry enough metadata to trace it back to the revision, current state, and integrity checks shown in-page.
